data.title: Watsco expands arsenal of digital, AI tools in Q4
data.description: On artificial intelligence, executives said Watsco has begun applying AI to pricing, customer engagement, and operational efficiency.

data.title: Deloitte: Digitally mature B2B suppliers post faster sales growth
data.description: Over the past two years, the average number of channels enabled increased 38%, rising to 4.7 channels in 2025 from 3.4 in 2023.

data.title: Sourceability appoints a chief procurement officer
data.description: The company said the appointment reflects its continued investment in integrating procurement execution with digital platforms and analytics.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: 3 types of features ecommerce platforms are betting on in 2026
data.description: For integrations, AI agents and more, the most popular ecommerce platforms among leading online retailers in North America have clear use cases in mind as they compete for retailers' websites in the year ahead.

data.title: Unilever inks five-year AI and cloud partnership with Google Cloud
data.description: The deal underscores a broader push among consumer-packaged goods companies to invest in cloud infrastructure and generative AI.
